mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 011 > vehicles > Then he fished under his cot for his
mechanics.excerpt: Then he fished under his cot for his cooling vest something all MechWarriors relied on in the blistering heat of BattleMech cockpit and pulled that on as well: Good choices since both were resistant bullets and the guards around here seemed fond of the Rorynex.
